name: comments
summary: Reusable threaded comments on any entity: comments table + RLS, paginated list, optimistic add, one-level replies, hook + stub.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_comments.sql (public-read; write/delete your own; entity_type + entity_id)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
Use useComments('post', postId) for a paginated thread with optimistic add.
Replace src/features/comments/ui/comments-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
